rationale: Tied 8/12 scoring on host-resume (A) vs compact-summary injection (B); tie broken on risk severity — BUG-1385 confirms A's --continue/--resume resolves to most-recent-session with no concurrency-safe precedent under ll-parallel/ll-sprint, while B's cost is a bounded per-hop summarization call reusing tested FEAT-2598 infra and preserving the ENH-2486 fresh-session invariant.
rule: Option B: compact-summary injection via FEAT-2598 compact_session/compact_result_for_session
alternatives_rejected: Option A: session_mode continue via host-level resume — rejected due to unmitigated most-recent-session concurrency hazard
